## The three questions
1. **Which document changed first?** (design doc / `cards.toml` + `cards_design.md`, or "no behavior change")
2. **Which tests own this?** (new or cited — a bug fix ships with the test that would have caught it)
3. **Did the gates run?** `make test && make catalog-check` (paste the tail)

Findings touched (R-numbers), ratchet movement (46/59 →), and any ACCEPTED debt created — name the lever.
